titles.title: Till the End of Time – v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In perfect time you came into my life In your arms, I have survived as you hold me Till the end of time

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are the calm of the stormy nights Your gentle love, have raised me up as you hold me Till the end of time

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Till the end of time, I swear to you I care Till the end of time, my vow endures like the ocean Till the end of time, I love you more

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In perfect time you came into my life Like the morning sun, you gave me hope as I hold on Till the end of time
